compressed_prompt: Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula no commas
response:
In the misty mountains of the Korean land
A story's told of a divided stand
A peninsula torn by the hands of time
A nation split in two a sorrowful rhyme

The Demilitarized Zone a buffer wide
A physical scar where hearts have died
Families torn apart by the lines of fate
Longing to be whole to participate

In the silence of the night
The sound of whispers echoes a gentle light
A beacon of hope in the dark of pain
A call to reunite the love that remains

The rivers flow the mountains stand
A testament to a land so grand
A culture rich a history so bright
A people yearning for a peaceful night

The sun rises over the eastern sea
A new dawn breaks for you and me
A chance to heal the wounds of the past
To bring together what was meant to last

In the stillness of the morning dew
A prayer is whispered for me and you
For a Korea whole and free
A dream that's held in unity.
